listings.title: Slack.hackclub.com
listings.description: Show this page some love! Make Pull Requests fulfilling all 4 of the following requests and you will receive the honor of chosing a custom Slackbot reply! Courtesy of Sir Evan, the SlackMaster. (in addition to a grant for each PR)
requirements: Fix or remove the animation on the 'join hack club' box.
Add animated screen recording gifs illustrating how to use Slack in the 'How Slack Works' sections.
